region.depth_slices: 26 slices centered at mid-depth (lo = max(0, d//2 - 13))
region.note: predict a probability map over exactly this 4096x4096 level-2 region

ground_truth.origin: 2023 Grand-Prize-era human ink annotation (villa ink-detection train_scrolls inklabels) registered onto the re-flattened SOTA geometry

registration.method: obj-exact: original.obj vt (427091 vertices), NN bridge via on-7.91um tifxyz (same old-scan frame), vt convention rowHv_colu (selected by teacher-enrichment among 4 discrete candidates, disclosed; orientation verified visually)

gate.note: teacher-dependent enrichment is only a DIAGNOSTIC here (1.68); residual and periodicity are convention-blind

registration.validation_basis: teacher-free: residual 7.85 ~= the enrichment-validated sibling target's 7.92; text-line periodicity 0.871 ~= 0.900; rowHv_colu export-convention prior; visual letterforms
registration.caveat: ~8-voxel median correspondence residual smears stroke edges at 64px scale; scores are lower bounds on true agreement

role: HELD-OUT flagship target: no public model we know of was trained on this segment; the released canon prediction itself scores near chance here (ROC ~0.56) — see baselines/
